name: Datica
description: HIPAA-compliant healthcare cloud and integration platform providing any-to-any EHR data exchange with built-in compliance tooling.

seo.title: Datica — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Datica: HIPAA-compliant healthcare cloud and integration platform providing any-to-any EHR data exchange with built-in compliance tooling.

when_to_use: HIPAA-compliant EHR integration with HL7/FHIR translation
BAA-covered cloud hosting for digital health applications
PHI data exchange compliance between health systems
Any-to-any EHR connectivity for health tech startups
HITRUST certification readiness for healthcare SaaS

pros: Any-to-any EHR translation across HL7, FHIR, X12
HIPAA compliance handled in the managed platform
Reduces integration engineering from months to weeks
Experienced team in healthcare cloud migrations
cons: Enterprise pricing not friendly to early-stage startups
Product strategy has shifted multiple times post-pivots
Smaller network than Redox for EHR reach
review.verdict: A workable healthcare integration partner, but Redox and Health Gorilla dominate the mindshare for a reason.
review.best_for: Health systems needing managed cloud plus integration bundled
review.not_for: Startups shopping specifically for the biggest EHR network

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
